message:
test(raptorq): add 10 envelope crypto isolation and tamper-detection tests

New tests verifying the AEAD construction properly binds metadata fields
to the ciphertext in the RaptorQ symbol envelope:

- sender_subkey_differs_by_zone_key: different zone keys produce different subkeys
- sender_subkey_differs_by_zone_key_id: different key IDs produce different subkeys
- nonce24_different_frame_seq: nonce varies by frame sequence number
- nonce24_different_esi: nonce varies by encoding symbol ID
- aad_changes_with_esi: AAD differs when ESI changes
- aad_changes_with_k: AAD differs when K changes
- aad_changes_with_epoch: AAD differs when epoch changes
- envelope_serde_roundtrip: encrypt → serialize → deserialize → decrypt
- tampered_epoch_causes_decrypt_failure: tampering epoch_id after
  encryption causes authentication failure
- tampered_esi_causes_decrypt_failure: tampering ESI after encryption
  causes authentication failure

These verify cryptographic isolation across all envelope metadata
dimensions and ensure tamper detection works correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
